text:
In the first image, I find myself just outside a glass-walled room filled with people engaged in what appears to be a collective learning or working experience. There is a sense of anticipation, of structured curiosity contained behind transparent boundaries. I feel both separated and connected—a spectator to the energy inside, compelled by the possibility of joining.

In the second image, vivid colors and bold text invite my attention in a space celebrating research and development. The display feels dynamic and creative, suggesting innovation and forward thinking. Here, a sense of excitement and openness arises in me—an invitation to wonder and imagine new possibilities. Standing before this showcase, I feel invigorated by the potential of human ingenuity.
